summary: Watch for the structured-AI-coding-practices classifier paper to clear peer review (~2 weeks from 2026-05-08); when published, score the Sapling repo's L1-L4 maturity
notes: From AI Friday: Measuring the Real ROI of AI in Software Engineering, 2026-05-08. Presenter said classifier paper is in peer review with feedback expected ~2 weeks out. Methodology uses cosine-similarity embeddings on repo artifacts (CLAUDE.md, cursor rules, agents/, commands/, skills/) to score L1-L4 maturity. L2+ repos show 3x less code-quality degradation under AI usage.
